playbook.intent: From alert ping at 3am to root-caused, mitigated, postmortem-documented incident — designed for one person, not a SRE rotation.
playbook.scope: From alert ping at 3am to root-caused, mitigated, postmortem-documented incident — designed for one person, not a SRE rotation.

success-criteria.criterion: Final stage decision-gate is met and committed in writing
Every stage produces its named outputs
Cycle closes only when a written commitment exists for the next step

stage.name: Alert triage
stage.intent: Decide in 60 seconds: real or noise.

tasks.task: Read the alert payload and recent deploys
Tag the incident: P0 / P1 / noise

stage.decision-gate: Advance only if confirmed real. If noise: silence alert, return to bed.

stage.name: Stop the bleed

tasks.task: Flip the kill switch / disable bad flag / roll back

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when error rate is below alert threshold.

stage.name: Containment + customer comms

tasks.task: Send a quick we know we are on it message
Identify any affected paying customers for direct contact

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when comms are posted with a time commitment.

stage.name: Root cause
stage.intent: Find the why, not just the what.

tasks.task: Replay logs around the incident window
Check recent deploys, config changes, traffic spikes
Write a 5-whys for the root cause

stage.decision-gate: Advance only with a named root cause.

stage.name: Permanent fix + monitor
stage.intent: Ship the real fix and prove it sticks.

tasks.task: Ship the code fix with tests
Add a regression test or monitor
Verify in production over the next cohort

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when the fix is live AND the new monitor would have caught it.

stage.name: Blameless postmortem
stage.intent: Write the doc even when you are the only blamer.
stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes when postmortem is committed and follow-ups are scheduled.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content solo-prod-incident-response-no-team-safety-net --format md, agent: faion get-content solo-prod-incident-response-no-team-safety-net --format context, json: faion get-content solo-prod-incident-response-no-team-safety-net --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial v2 draft generated from F-059..063 backlog}]
